changelog: v1.0.4 — Installer reliability: Claude Desktop config merge is now UTF-8 without BOM and preserves every existing MCP server (backup before write, fails safely on malformed JSON). Revit addin deploy falls back to %AppData% when ProgramData ACLs block machine-scope install. Git is auto-installed via winget (with Git-for-Windows fallback). Fixes: manage_project_parameters modify (add/remove/replace) now actually persists; ElementId equality on net48 in audit_families; RoofBase abstract-class crash on system family pass; CategoryResolver no longer silently matches partial names; better error when a built-in parameter's bindings can't be changed. Plus: typed MCP signatures on 81 tools for better LLM discovery, and CategoryResolver adoption across 13 tools so 'Foundations' / 'Structural Foundations' / 'Fondazione strutturale' all resolve correctly.
